notes.body: Shopper scores: Let's get our shoppers to #1 — we're at the bottom this week. Drive, Coach, & Celebrate our Halo Effect!
SCAM ALERT: Scammers calling stores as "Uber" with connectivity issues asking for email+login. NO ONE gives login info over the phone. Post this by the phone.
Is Ryan Vititoe still employed with us? Reply yes/no so payroll can close it out.
Manager Certifications 2065 COMPLETE — Rusul 100, Anthony 99, Madelynn 98; training videos fixed.
7/17 deposit not yet entered — book cash $433.90 showing as O/S short. Enter the deposit in CrunchTime.
